name: GitHub Copilot
description: Your AI pair programmer that helps you write code faster.
overview: GitHub Copilot is an AI pair programmer that offers autocomplete-style suggestions as you code. You can receive suggestions from GitHub Copilot either by starting to write the code you want to use, or by writing a natural language comment describing what you want the code to do.
pros: Trained on billions of lines of code

name: Cursor
description: The AI-first Code Editor. Write, edit, and chat with your code.
overview: Cursor is a fork of VS Code built from the ground up for programming with AI. It includes advanced features like 'Cursor Tab' for multi-line edits, native codebase indexing for deep context, and Cmd-K for generating code inline.
cons: Requires migrating away from base VS Code
Some VS Code sync features missing
